facebook.caption:
4.9 stars. 1,630 reviews. At a fusion restaurant on Phu Quoc.

FUSION Treats on Đường Dinh Bà is quietly stacking one of the highest ratings on the island. Over a thousand people didn't lie.

Fusion done right in Phu Quoc is rare. This place keeps delivering it, review after review.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
